ab: Malu bi lupung mu o Watan , laqi Truku ka hiya uri .
ch: 我的好朋友叫Watan，他也是太魯閣族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Watan, and he is also an Truku child.

ab: Seupu nami matas mniq alang Kdusan .
en: We study together in the Kdusan tribe.

ab: Seupu nami embahang rudan rmngaw endaan sbiyaw kdjiyax , mkla nami bi rmngaw kari Truku .
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說太魯閣語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Truku proficiently.

ab: Takar ni mtbnaw ku bi , llbu ni hlawax bi ka Watan .
ch: 我很高也很胖，Watan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Watan is short and thin.

ab: Mpplaq bi ka Watan , smkuxul bi hyaan kana .
ch: Watan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Watan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
